历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 14174 → 11982 → 17056 → 16864 → 19056, showing an overall fluctuating and backward-moving trend. In the recent 3 years, it moved from 17056 to 19056, a cumulative backward shift of about 2000 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 19056. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 54 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 63 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 65, an increase of 2 (+3.2%) compared to 2025, continuing the expansion trend, with slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science main ranking was 57th in 2021 → 47th in 2022 → 50th in 2023 → 51st in 2024 → 55th in 2025 → 59th in 2026, with stable rankings in the 50–60 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, with no obvious negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 41st (relatively hot), with short video exposure of about 998,000 views, indicating a certain level of application attention. There is no history of admission cut-off gaps. It has Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, and Pharmacy A-, totaling 6 A-/A/A+ disciplines, showing outstanding strength among 211 universities. Although majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering do not directly correspond to A-level disciplines, the university's comprehensive strength supports engineering majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a first-tier city and popular region. Its enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025). Although not a local university, the South China region has a certain appeal to candidates from Southwest China. Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended/recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with continuously rising application heat. The number of Chongqing Physics Category candidates grew from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 137,940 in 2026 (a slight decrease of 1.1% from 2025), still at a high level. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation and backward trend, the continued expansion of the 2026 plan (+3.2%), the rising heat of popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, and the still-high number of Chongqing Physics Category candidates, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 19056. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19439, with a range of 18939–19939.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<18939), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>19939), prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety net.

学校层次与声誉.text: Jinan University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is relatively hot/recommended, Chinese Language/Chinese major is recommended, Journalism and Communication major is clearly discouraged (continuously affected by Zhang Xuefeng's remarks). 预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction in the 2026 plan (-7.4%), the continuous decrease in Chongqing History Category examinees (-3.2%), and the relatively hot popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language, based on the 2025 baseline of 3907, competition is expected to ease slightly.
